content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:10 offers "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", a quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering rewards in exchange for reviews or specifically incentivizing 5-star ratings, since this manipulates the rating system and misleads other users. This exact string was found in the paywall UI, not just metadata, making it highly visible to reviewers. Remove this line entirely, or replace it with a neutral prompt using `SKStoreReviewController` that offers no reward tied to the review itself.
